name: /prompt-eval: emits per-record token cost line items to telemetry (H-1 cross-ref)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro evals/datasets/agents prompts/rsc-reviewer && echo '{"bootstrap_seed":true,"input":"x","expected":"y"}' > evals/datasets/agents/rsc-reviewer.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" rsc-reviewer --version 2.1.0 --emit-telemetry "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/telemetry.jsonl" && grep "tokens_used" .claude-tdd-pro/telemetry.jsonl 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
